items.title: Heads up! DJI’s Osmo Pocket 3 vlogging camera down is down to $378 all-time low for Prime Day
items.summary: As part of its ongoing Prime Day sale, you’ll find DJI’s Osmo Pocket 3 4K vlogging camera down at $378 shipped (fulfilled by Amazon). B&H is also matching this price today as part of its Summer sale event, in case you’re looking for more ways to buy it. Either way, you’re looking at the lowest price ever on this popular vlogging camera, down from its usual going of $499. We did see it briefly drop to the $400 mark earlier this year at Woot as part of a daily deals offer, but today’s Prime Day offer beats that by an additional $22 to mark a new best price to beat. Even with the newer Osmo Pocket 4 now on the scene, the Pocket 3 remains a compelling option at $378 for anyone looking to step up from their phone camera.

Buy for $16.50 (Reg. $22)

What we love

Slice’s retractable ceramic cutter is a handy tool for opening packages, cutting through packing tape, and slicing plastic wrapping, with a blade that is less likely to nick your fingers than a traditional utility knife.
